description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior is primarily finished in a muted blue-gray color, complemented by large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The front yard features a paved driveway flanked by manicured shrubs and flowering bushes, leading up to a recessed main entryway. The house includes multiple outdoor terraces and balconies, with one section set apart as a possible garage or guest suite. The roof is flat and appears to have functional areas, possibly for seating or utilities. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and natural light.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, blue-gray exterior, large windows, and landscaped front yard. Features include terraces, a driveway, and minimalist geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, landscaped garden, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, outdoor terraces, and a detached section that may serve as a garage or guest suite.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, back terrace, and large windows, with minimal landscaping visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, additional landscaping, and the connection between the main structure and the detached section.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a paved walkway, minimal overhang, and flanked by landscaped shrubs
